actionCalls.name: Log_Debug_Account_found_by_Account_Id
actionCalls.label: Log - Debug - Account found by Account Id

actionCalls.name: Log_Debug_No_Provider_User_Found_Looking_For_Queue
actionCalls.label: Log - Debug - No Provider User Found - Looking For Queue

value.stringValue: No Provider User Found - Looking For Queue

actionCalls.name: Log_Debug_Opportunity_found_by_Opportunity_Id
actionCalls.label: Log - Debug - Opportunity found by Opportunity Id

actionCalls.name: Log_Debug_Opportunity_found_by_Transaction_Number
actionCalls.label: Log - Debug - Opportunity found by Transaction Number

actionCalls.name: Log_Debug_Opportunity_found_by_Transaction_Order_Id
actionCalls.label: Log - Debug - Opportunity found by Transaction Order Id

value.stringValue: Opportunity found by Transaction Order Id

actionCalls.name: Log_Debug_Patient_Demographic_Mis_Match
actionCalls.label: Log - Debug - Patient Demographic Mis-Match

actionCalls.name: Log_Debug_Started
actionCalls.label: Log - Debug - Started

actionCalls.name: Log_Error_Failed_Creating_Appointment_Record
actionCalls.label: Log - Error - Failed Creating Appointment Record

actionCalls.name: Log_Error_Failed_Getting_Account_Record
actionCalls.label: Log - Error - Failed Getting Account Record

actionCalls.name: Log_Error_Failed_Getting_Opportunity_Record
actionCalls.label: Log - Error - Failed Getting Opportunity Record

actionCalls.name: Log_Error_Failed_Getting_Opportunity_Transaction_Order_Id
actionCalls.label: Log - Error - Failed Getting Opportunity - Transaction Order Id

value.stringValue: Failed Getting Opportunity - Transaction Order Id

actionCalls.name: Log_Error_Failed_Getting_Patient_Scheduling_Queue
actionCalls.label: Log - Error - Failed Getting Patient Scheduling Queue

actionCalls.name: Log_Error_Failed_Getting_Product_Configurations
actionCalls.label: Log - Error - Failed Getting Product Configurations

value.stringValue: Failed finding a product with the Calendly Booking Name

actionCalls.name: Log_Error_Failed_Getting_Provider_Accounts
actionCalls.label: Log - Error - Failed Getting Provider Accounts

actionCalls.name: Log_Error_Failed_Getting_Scheduled_Appointment_Schedule
actionCalls.label: Log - Error - Failed Getting Scheduled Appointment - Schedule

actionCalls.name: Log_Error_Failed_Getting_User_Record
actionCalls.label: Log - Error - Failed Getting User Record

actionCalls.name: Log_Error_Failed_Updating_Appointment_Conflict
actionCalls.label: Log - Error - Failed Updating Appointment Conflict

actionCalls.name: Log_Error_Failed_Updating_Appointment_Reschedule_Schedule
actionCalls.label: Log - Error - Failed Updating Appointment - Reschedule Schedule

actionCalls.name: Log_Error_Failed_Updating_CalendlyAction
actionCalls.label: Log - Error - Failed Updating CalendlyAction

actionCalls.name: Log_Error_Failed_Updating_Opportunity
actionCalls.label: Log - Error - Failed Updating Opportunity

actionCalls.name: Log_Error_Unsupported_CalendlyAction_Event
actionCalls.label: Log - Error - Unsupported CalendlyAction Event

actionCalls.name: Log_Warning_Duplicate_Appointment_for_Same_Opportunity
actionCalls.label: Log - Warning - Duplicate Appointment for Same Opportunity

actionCalls.description: Provider Account, {!rec_CalendyAction.Calendly__EventPrimaryPublisherEmail__c}, wasn’t found and was not assigned to this Appointment.
actionCalls.name: Log_Warning_No_Provider_Account_Found_No_Provider_Set_on_Appointment
actionCalls.label: Log - Warning - No Provider Account Found - No Provider Set on Appointment

value.stringValue: Provider Account, {!rec_CalendyAction.Calendly__EventPrimaryPublisherEmail__c}, wasn’t found and was not assigned to this Appointment.

actionCalls.name: Log_Warning_No_Provider_User_Found_No_Queue_Found
actionCalls.label: Log - Warning - No Provider User Found - No Queue Found

value.stringValue: No Provider User Found - No Queue Found

actionCalls.description: Provider Account, {!Get_Provider_Account.Name}, Account Status field isn’t set as an Active and was not assigned to this Appointment.
actionCalls.name: Log_Warning_Provider_Account_Not_Active
actionCalls.label: Log - Warning - Provider Account Not Active

value.stringValue: Provider Account, {!Get_Provider_Account.Name}, Account Status field isn’t set as an Active and was not assigned to this Appointment.

actionCalls.name: Save_Log
actionCalls.label: Save Log

actionCalls.name: Send_Email_to_Scheduling_Team_Duplicate_Event
actionCalls.label: Send Email to Scheduling Team - Duplicate Event

assignments.description: Here we set the Appointment Record to IsError TRUE and set the error code message to signify what the error is.
assignments.name: Set_Conflicted_Appointment
assignments.label: Set Conflicted Appointment

assignments.description: This will ensure that the Opportuntiy record knows how many active appointments there are. This will help with automations and reporting.
assignments.name: Set_Number_of_Appointment_Count
assignments.label: Set Number of Appointment Count

assignments.description: Since a Opportunity Record was found we want to set that on the appointment.
assignments.name: Set_Opportunity_Id_and_Account_Id_on_Appointment
assignments.label: Set Opportunity Id and Account Id on Appointment

assignments.name: Set_Opportunity_Record_SF_Object_Id
assignments.label: Set Opportunity Record - SF Object Id

assignments.name: Set_Opportunity_Record_Transaction_Order_Id
assignments.label: Set Opportunity Record - Transaction Order Id

assignments.description: This can only be done when the Opportunity Id is on the CalendlyAction as that is the Record Type that has these Stages and Statues.
assignments.name: Set_Opportunity_Values_Scheduled
assignments.label: Set Opportunity Values - Scheduled

assignments.name: Set_Profile_Type_to_Appointment_Type
assignments.label: Set Profile Type to Appointment Type

decisions.description: Here we need to check if a provider was found or not. If there was no provider found then we need to assign the Appointment to a Queue
decisions.name: Did_We_Find_A_Provider
decisions.label: Did We Find A Provider

decisions.description: Here we need to check if a provider was found or not. If there was no provider found then we need to assign the Appointment to a Queue
decisions.name: Did_We_Find_A_Provider_0
decisions.label: Did We Find A Provider

decisions.description:
While looking up the records, if we found one, we would have set the OwnerId as the record owner.
In the last step, we attempted to overwrite the OwnerId with the id of the user whose email matches the publisher.
So at this point, we hope to have an owner defined. If we don't we'll have to look up the system admin.
decisions.name: Did_We_Find_a_User_Record
decisions.label: Did We Find a User Record

decisions.description: We check to see if we found an Opportunity
decisions.name: Did_We_Find_An_Opportunity
decisions.label: Did We Find An Opportunity?

decisions.name: Did_We_Find_Opportunity_with_Order_Id
decisions.label: Did We Find Opportunity with Order Id

decisions.description: Here we check to see if we got the opportunity record or not. If we did then we need to update else we don't.
decisions.name: Did_We_Get_the_Opportunity_Record
decisions.label: Did We Get the Opportunity Record

decisions.description: Here we check that the entered data from the patient matches the Salesforce records.
decisions.name: Is_Patient_Demographic_Data_Correct
decisions.label: Is Patient Demographic Data Correct

decisions.description: Here we check the Get Product Config lookup to see if we got a record. This will let us know what type we need to set.
decisions.name: Is_there_a_Product_Config_with_This_Form_Name
decisions.label: Is there a Product Config with This Form Name

decisions.description: Here we see if the patient has already scheduled an appointment for this particular opportunity. If they have then we know that they are trying to book more than once and we need to inform the team that something is wrong.
decisions.name: Is_there_a_Scheduled_Appointment
decisions.label: Is there a Scheduled Appointment?

decisions.description:
If we cannot find the system admin profile, we cannot find the system admin. And if we're at this point in the logic, we have no other owner.
So there's no path forward if the profile is not found.
decisions.name: Profile_Found
decisions.label: Profile Found?

decisions.name: What_is_the_number_of_Appointments
decisions.label: What is the number of Appointments?

Flow.description: This automation will run for all of the calendly action records that were created and create appointments/events when it meets the criteria.

formulas.description: This will get everything left of the "-" in the name as everything after the "-" is the state name.
formulas.name: form_txtCalendlyFormNameLeft
form_txtCalendlyResponses
formulas.expression: IF(ISBLANK({!rec_CalendyAction.Calendly__CustomQuestion1__c}), "", {!rec_CalendyAction.Calendly__CustomQuestion1__c} & " - " & {!rec_CalendyAction.Calendly__CustomResponse1__c} & BR()) & IF(ISBLANK({!rec_CalendyAction.Calendly__CustomQuestion2__c}), "", {!rec_CalendyAction.Calendly__CustomQuestion2__c} & " - " & {!rec_CalendyAction.Calendly__CustomResponse2__c} & BR()) & IF(ISBLANK({!rec_CalendyAction.Calendly__CustomQuestion3__c}), "", {!rec_CalendyAction.Calendly__CustomQuestion3__c} & " - " & {!rec_CalendyAction.Calendly__CustomResponse3__c} & BR()) & IF(ISBLANK({!rec_CalendyAction.Calendly__CustomQuestion4__c}), "", {!rec_CalendyAction.Calendly__CustomQuestion4__c} & " - " & {!rec_CalendyAction.Calendly__CustomResponse4__c} & BR()) & IF(ISBLANK({!rec_CalendyAction.Calendly__CustomQuestion5__c}), "", {!rec_CalendyAction.Calendly__CustomQuestion5__c} & " - " & {!rec_CalendyAction.Calendly__CustomResponse5__c} & BR()) & IF(ISBLANK({!rec_CalendyAction.Calendly__CustomQuestion6__c}), "", {!rec_CalendyAction.Calendly__CustomQuestion6__c} & " - " & {!rec_CalendyAction.Calendly__CustomResponse6__c} & BR()) & IF(ISBLANK({!rec_CalendyAction.Calendly__CustomQuestion7__c}), "", {!rec_CalendyAction.Calendly__CustomQuestion7__c} & " - " & {!rec_CalendyAction.Calendly__CustomResponse7__c} & BR()) & IF(ISBLANK({!rec_CalendyAction.Calendly__CustomQuestion8__c}), "", {!rec_CalendyAction.Calendly__CustomQuestion8__c} & " - " & {!rec_CalendyAction.Calendly__CustomResponse8__c} & BR()) & IF(ISBLANK({!rec_CalendyAction.Calendly__CustomQuestion9__c}), "", {!rec_CalendyAction.Calendly__CustomQuestion9__c} & " - " & {!rec_CalendyAction.Calendly__CustomResponse9__c} & BR()) & IF(ISBLANK({!rec_CalendyAction.Calendly__CustomQuestion10__c}), "", {!rec_CalendyAction.Calendly__CustomQuestion10__c} & " - " & {!rec_CalendyAction.Calendly__CustomResponse10__c})

Flow.label: Autolaunch - Create Salesforce Appointment

recordLookups.description: Get the Consultation Opportunity created from the Consultation Product
recordLookups.name: Get_Opportunity_Transaction_Order_Id
recordLookups.label: Get Opportunity - Transaction Order Id

recordLookups.name: Get_Product_Config_Where_Calendly_Form_Name_Contains_Event_Subject
recordLookups.label: Get Product Config Where Calendly Form Name Contains Event Subject

recordUpdates.description: Considering that we are booking a new appointment, look for an appointment that is connected to the opportunity and is in Pending Reschedule status and does not already have "Was Rescheduled" flag. If found, update the was rescheduled flag to true
recordUpdates.name: Update_Pending_Schedule_Appointments
recordUpdates.label: Update Pending Schedule Appointments

textTemplates.name: txt_AppointmentFlowError
textTemplates.text: Error Trying to Set Appointment Conflicts. {!$Flow.FaultMessage}

textTemplates.name: txt_DuplicateAppointments
textTemplates.text: Booking Error: More than one appointment has been scheduled for the same opportunity. Each opportunity is limited to a single appointment. Please review the appointments and make any necessary adjustments.

textTemplates.name: txt_DuplicateEventTemplate
textTemplates.text: This Opportunity has Duplicated Clarity Call Event

textTemplates.name: txt_PatientDemographic_ErrorMessage
textTemplates.text: Patient Demographic Data Mismatch Error: The demographic information submitted during appointment scheduling does not align with the patient's existing record. Please advise the patient to verify their details and ensure accuracy in alignment with their official patient profile.

textTemplates.name: txt_UnsupportedForm
textTemplates.text: No Appointment Created Because the Calendly Form, {!form_txtCalendlyFormNameLeft}, is unsupported.

transforms.name: Get_Opportunity_Ids_Transaction_Source_Number
transforms.label: Get Opportunity Ids - Transaction Source Number

variables.description: This is the opportunity that is updated
variables.name: rec_UpdatedOpportunity

variables.description: The Record Id that we need to use for all future lookups.
variables.name: txt_RecordId
